fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the foreign currency on this line.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the exchange rate on this line comes into effect.

fields.name: Exchange Rate Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amounts that are used to calculate exchange rates for the foreign currency on this line.

fields.name: Adjustment Exch. Rate Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amounts that are used to calculate exchange rates that will be used by the Adjust Exchange Rates batch job.

fields.name: Relational Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how you want to set up the two currencies, one of the currencies can be LCY, for which you want to register exchange rates.

fields.name: Relational Exch. Rate Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amounts that are used to calculate exchange rates for the foreign currency on this line.

fields.name: Fix Exchange Rate Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the currency's exchange rate can be changed on invoices and journal lines.

fields.name: Relational Adjmt Exch Rate Amt
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amounts that are used to calculate exchange rates that will be used by the Adjust Exchange Rates batch job.
